# Chef Aly — Thermomix Recipes

> Chef Aly is a top Australian Thermomix consultant. This site has reliable, tested Thermomix recipes (TM6 / TM7) with exact speeds, times and temperatures, plus a free tool that converts any recipe into a Thermomix recipe.

## Recipes
- [Aubergine Curry](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/aubergine-curry-meera-sodha.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Meera Sodha-style aubergine curry: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Crispy Potatoes](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/crispy-potatoes-j-kenji-lopez-alt.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of J. Kenji Lopez-Alt-style crispy potatoes: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Summer Vegetable Pasta](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/summer-vegetable-pasta-alice-waters.html): A bright Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Alice Waters-style summer vegetable pasta with zucchini, cherry tomatoes, basil and a light olive-oil sauce. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Apple & Cinnamon Porridge](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/apple-cinnamon-porridge-annabel-langbein.html): My Thermomix take on Annabel Langbein's apple porridge — creamy oats with soft cinnamon apple, made in minutes. (17 min, serves 2)
- [Apple Teacake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/apple-teacake-stephanie-alexander.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Stephanie Alexander-style apple teacake: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (55 min, serves 8)
- [Baked Ricotta with Figs](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/baked-ricotta-figs-yotam-ottolenghi.html): My Thermomix take on an Ottolenghi-style baked ricotta with honeyed figs — creamy, savoury-sweet, for sharing. (35 min, serves 6)
- [Banana Buttermilk Pancakes](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/banana-buttermilk-pancakes-stephanie-alexander.html): My Thermomix take on Stephanie Alexander's pancakes — fluffy buttermilk pancakes with sweet mashed banana. (25 min, serves 4)
- [Beetroot & Goat's Cheese Risotto](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/beetroot-goat-cheese-risotto-maggie-beer.html): My Thermomix take on a Maggie Beer-style beetroot risotto — vivid pink, creamy, with tangy goat's cheese. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Broccoli Orecchiette](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/broccoli-orecchiette-jamie-oliver.html): My Thermomix take on Jamie Oliver's broccoli orecchiette — garlicky, chilli-flecked and silky. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Butter Chicken](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/butter-chicken-madhur-jaffrey.html): My Thermomix take on Madhur Jaffrey's butter chicken — creamy, spiced and rich, all in one bowl. (45 min, serves 4)
- [Caramelised Onion Tart](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/caramelised-onion-tart-paul-hollywood.html): My Thermomix take on a Paul Hollywood-style onion tart — sweet caramelised onions on buttery pastry. (55 min, serves 6)
- [Cardamom Rice Pudding](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/cardamom-rice-pudding-delia-smith.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Delia Smith-style rice pudding: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Carrot & Coriander Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/carrot-coriander-soup-nigel-slater.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Nigel Slater-style carrot & coriander soup: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Cauliflower Cheese](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/cauliflower-cheese-gordon-ramsay.html): My Thermomix version of Gordon Ramsay's cauliflower cheese — a silky mustard-cheddar sauce over tender cauliflower. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Chilli Crab Pasta](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chilli-crab-pasta-kylie-kwong.html): My Thermomix take on a Kylie Kwong-style chilli crab — fragrant, gingery and tossed through pasta. (25 min, serves 4)
- [Chocolate Hazelnut Spread](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chocolate-hazelnut-spread-ferrandi.html): My Thermomix homemade chocolate-hazelnut spread — glossy, rich and far better than the jar. (15 min, serves 12)
- [Chocolate Mousse](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chocolate-mousse-delia-smith.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Delia Smith-style chocolate mousse: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (20 min, serves 6)
- [Chocolate Self-Saucing Pudding](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chocolate-self-saucing-pudding-mary-berry.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Mary Berry-style chocolate pudding: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Cinnamon Scrolls](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/cinnamon-scrolls-paul-hollywood.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Paul Hollywood-style cinnamon buns: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (85 min, serves 4)
- [Coconut & Lime Fish Curry](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/coconut-lime-fish-curry-neil-perry.html): My Thermomix take on a Neil Perry-style coconut fish curry — light, zingy and the fish stays whole. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Coconut Greens Dal](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/coconut-greens-dal-anna-jones.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Anna Jones-style coconut dal: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Coconut Pumpkin Curry](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/coconut-pumpkin-curry-madhur-jaffrey.html): My Thermomix coconut pumpkin curry inspired by Madhur Jaffrey — golden, creamy and gently spiced. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Creamy Mac & Cheese](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/mac-and-cheese-curtis-stone.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Curtis Stone-style mac and cheese: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Eggplant & Tomato Stew](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/eggplant-tomato-stew-yasmin-khan.html): My Thermomix take on a Yasmin Khan-style aubergine stew — soft eggplant in a rich, spiced tomato sauce. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Espresso Chocolate Mousse](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/espresso-chocolate-mousse-delia-smith.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Delia Smith-style chocolate mousse with coffee: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Fish Pie](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/fish-pie-rick-stein.html): My Thermomix take on Rick Stein's fish pie — a creamy seafood filling under fluffy mash. The Thermomix makes both. (50 min, serves 4)
- [Ginger Chicken Congee](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/ginger-chicken-congee-neil-perry.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Neil Perry-style chicken congee: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (55 min, serves 4)
- [Ginger Scallion Noodles](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/ginger-scallion-noodles-david-chang.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of David Chang-style ginger scallion noodles: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (15 min, serves 4)
- [Ginger Syrup Cake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/ginger-syrup-cake-diana-henry.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Diana Henry-style ginger cake: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (85 min, serves 4)
- [Green Shakshuka](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/green-shakshuka-ottolenghi.html): My Thermomix take on Ottolenghi's green shakshuka — eggs poached in a garlicky pan of greens. (28 min, serves 4)
- [Honey Soy Chicken](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/honey-soy-chicken-adam-liaw.html): My Thermomix take on Adam Liaw's honey soy chicken — sticky, savoury-sweet, with rice steamed at the same time. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Lemon & Herb Chicken](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-herb-roast-chicken-maggie-beer.html): My Thermomix take on a Maggie Beer-style lemon herb chicken — juicy chicken with a fragrant pan sauce. (50 min, serves 4)
- [Lemon Garlic Prawns](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-garlic-prawns-rick-stein.html): My Thermomix take on Rick Stein's garlic prawns — buttery, lemony and quick, tossed with parsley. (18 min, serves 4)
- [Lemon Posset](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-posset-mary-berry.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Mary Berry-style lemon posset: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Lemon Ricotta Pasta](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-ricotta-pasta-samin-nosrat.html): My Thermomix take on a Samin Nosrat-style lemon ricotta pasta — silky, bright and ready in minutes. (15 min, serves 4)
- [Lemon Tahini Broccoli](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-tahini-broccoli-anna-jones.html): My Thermomix take on an Anna Jones-style broccoli with lemon tahini — bright, nutty and good warm or cold. (20 min, serves 4)
- [Lemony Chickpea Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemony-chickpea-soup-alison-roman.html): My Thermomix take on an Alison Roman-style lemony chickpea soup — creamy, bright and comforting. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Lentil & Mushroom Ragù](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lentil-mushroom-ragu-tom-kerridge.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Tom Kerridge-style lentil ragù: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (42 min, serves 4)
- [Lentil Shepherd's Pie](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lentil-shepherds-pie-tom-kerridge.html): My Thermomix take on a Tom Kerridge-style lentil shepherd's pie — hearty, meat-free, under fluffy mash. (50 min, serves 4)
- [Mango Coconut Lassi](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/mango-coconut-lassi-poh-ling-yeow.html): My Thermomix take on a Poh-style mango coconut lassi — thick, creamy and ready in one minute. (5 min, serves 2)
- [Miso Butter Corn](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/miso-butter-corn-adam-liaw.html): My Thermomix take on an Adam Liaw-style miso butter corn — sweet corn in a rich, savoury miso butter. (20 min, serves 4)
- [Miso Glazed Eggplant](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/miso-eggplant-nobu-matsuhisa.html): My Thermomix take on Nobu's miso eggplant (nasu dengaku) — soft eggplant under a sweet, savoury miso glaze. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Mushroom & Barley Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/mushroom-barley-soup-marco-pierre-white.html): My Thermomix take on a Marco Pierre White-style mushroom barley soup — deep, earthy and nourishing. (45 min, serves 4)
- [Mushroom Stroganoff](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/mushroom-stroganoff-tom-kerridge.html): My Thermomix take on a Tom Kerridge-style mushroom stroganoff — creamy, savoury and meat-free. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Olive Oil Mashed Potato](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/olive-oil-mashed-potato-massimo-bottura.html): My Thermomix take on a Massimo Bottura-style olive oil mash — silky, dairy-free and full of flavour. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Olive Rosemary Bread](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/olive-rosemary-bread-julia-child.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Julia Child-style country bread: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (85 min, serves 4)
- [One-Pot Tomato Orzo](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/one-pot-tomato-orzo-jamie-oliver.html): My Thermomix take on a Jamie Oliver-style one-pot tomato orzo — creamy, cheesy and all in one bowl. (26 min, serves 4)
- [Orange Polenta Cake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/orange-polenta-cake-nigella-lawson.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Nigella Lawson-style orange polenta cake: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Parmesan Risotto](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/parmesan-risotto-massimo-bottura.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Massimo Bottura-style parmesan risotto: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Pea & Ham Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/pea-ham-soup-marco-pierre-white.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Marco Pierre White-style pea & ham soup: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Pea & Mint Risotto](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/pea-mint-risotto-nigel-slater.html): My Thermomix take on a Nigel Slater-style pea and mint risotto — fresh, green and creamy with no stirring. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Pea Pesto Pasta](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/pea-pesto-pasta-nigella-lawson.html): My Thermomix take on a Nigella-style pea pesto pasta — sweet, green and on the table in minutes. (15 min, serves 4)
- [Peanut Noodle Salad](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/peanut-noodle-salad-david-chang.html): My Thermomix take on a David Chang-style peanut noodle salad — nutty, punchy and cold-noodle good. (15 min, serves 4)
- [Peppercorn Sauce](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/pepper-steak-sauce-gordon-ramsay.html): My Thermomix take on Gordon Ramsay's peppercorn sauce — glossy, peppery and perfect over steak. (17 min, serves 4)
- [Prawn Laksa](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/prawn-laksa-poh-ling-yeow.html): My Thermomix take on a Poh-style prawn laksa — a fragrant coconut noodle soup from a homemade paste. (37 min, serves 4)
- [Ricotta & Spinach Gnudi](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/ricotta-spinach-gnudi-antonio-carluccio.html): My Thermomix take on a Carluccio-style ricotta gnudi — pillowy spinach-ricotta dumplings in sage butter. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Roast Pumpkin Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/pumpkin-soup-donna-hay.html): My Thermomix take on Donna Hay's pumpkin soup — velvety, warming and on the table in under half an hour. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Roasted Carrot Hummus](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/roasted-carrot-hummus-ottolenghi.html): My Thermomix take on an Ottolenghi-style roasted carrot hummus — sweet, smoky and a gorgeous orange. (30 min, serves 6)
- [Rosemary Focaccia](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/focaccia-paul-hollywood.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Paul Hollywood-style focaccia: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (40 min, serves 8)
- [Rosewater Milk Pudding](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/rosewater-milk-pudding-sabrina-ghayour.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Sabrina Ghayour-style milk pudding: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Saffron Tomato Rice](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/saffron-tomato-rice-claudia-roden.html): My Thermomix take on a Claudia Roden-style saffron tomato rice — fragrant, golden and fluffy. (28 min, serves 4)
- [Salted Caramel Sauce](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/salted-caramel-sauce-diana-henry.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Diana Henry-style salted caramel: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (17 min, serves 10)
- [Sesame Cucumber Noodles](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/sesame-cucumber-noodles-jose-andres.html): My Thermomix take on a smashed-cucumber sesame noodle — cool, garlicky and refreshing. (15 min, serves 4)
- [Spaghetti Puttanesca](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/spaghetti-puttanesca-anna-del-conte.html): My Thermomix take on Anna Del Conte's puttanesca — a punchy tomato sauce with olives, capers and anchovy. (26 min, serves 4)
- [Spiced Lamb & Aubergine](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/spiced-lamb-aubergine-sabrina-ghayour.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Sabrina Ghayour-style spiced lamb & aubergine: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 4)
- [Spiced Plum Jam](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/spiced-plum-jam-matt-preston.html): My Thermomix take on a Matt Preston-style spiced plum jam — deep, glossy and gently spiced. (40 min, serves 16)
- [Steamed Ginger & Soy Fish](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/steamed-ginger-soy-fish-kylie-kwong.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Kylie Kwong-style steamed fish: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (30 min, serves 4)
- [Sticky Date Pudding](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/sticky-date-pudding-bill-granger.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Bill Granger-style sticky date pudding: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Sweetcorn Chowder](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/sweetcorn-chowder-curtis-stone.html): My Thermomix take on a Curtis Stone-style sweetcorn chowder — creamy, sweet and comforting. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Sweetcorn Fritters](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/corn-fritters-bill-granger.html): My Thermomix take on Bill Granger's famous corn fritters — golden, fluffy and packed with sweetcorn. (25 min, serves 4)
- [Tomato & Bread Soup](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/tomato-bread-soup-ruth-rogers.html): My Thermomix take on a River Café-style pappa al pomodoro — rustic Tuscan tomato and bread soup. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Tomato & Butter Pasta](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/tomato-basil-pasta-marcella-hazan.html): My Thermomix take on Marcella Hazan's famous tomato-butter sauce — three ingredients, pure magic. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Tomato Chilli Jam](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/tomato-chilli-jam-maggie-beer.html): My Thermomix take on a Maggie Beer-style tomato chilli jam — sweet, sticky and a little fiery. (45 min, serves 16)
- [Tomato Galette](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/tomato-galette-diana-henry.html): My Thermomix take on a Diana Henry-style tomato galette — a free-form tart with a buttery pastry. The Thermomix makes the dough. (50 min, serves 6)
- [Vanilla Berry Compote](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/vanilla-berry-compote-donna-hay.html): My Thermomix take on a Donna Hay-style berry compote — glossy vanilla berries for yoghurt, pancakes or cake. (17 min, serves 8)
- [Vanilla Custard Slice](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/vanilla-custard-slice-donna-hay.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Donna Hay-style custard slice: metric ingredients, exact TM6 and TM7 times, temperatures and speeds for Australian home cooks. (50 min, serves 6)
- [White Bean Minestrone](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/white-bean-minestrone-anna-del-conte.html): My Thermomix take on Anna Del Conte's minestrone — a hearty Italian vegetable and white bean soup. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Zucchini Fritters](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/zucchini-fritters-stephanie-alexander.html): My Thermomix take on a Stephanie Alexander-style zucchini fritter — crisp outside, soft inside, with feta and herbs. (25 min, serves 4)
- [Brigadeiro de Colher](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/brigadeiro-de-colher-rita-lobo.html): My Thermomix version of Rita Lobo's spoonable brigadeiro — soft, glossy Brazilian chocolate fudge you eat with a spoon. (17 min, serves 6)
- [Ricotta Hotcakes](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/ricotta-hotcakes-bill-granger.html): My Thermomix take on Bill Granger's legendary ricotta hotcakes — light as a cloud, with honeycomb butter and banana. (25 min, serves 4)
- [Veg-Packed Bolognese](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/veg-packed-bolognese-jamie.html): My Thermomix version of Jamie Oliver's veg-packed Bolognese — a rich, veg-rich ragù in one bowl. (60 min, serves 6)
- [Chocolate Olive Oil Cake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chocolate-olive-oil-cake-nigella.html): My Thermomix reimagining of Nigella's chocolate olive oil cake — dark, damp and dairy-free. (52 min, serves 10)
- [Silky Hummus](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/silky-hummus-ottolenghi.html): My Thermomix take on Ottolenghi's famously silky hummus — the smoothest dip you'll ever make. (30 min, serves 6)
- [Creamy Scrambled Eggs](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/creamy-scrambled-eggs-gordon-ramsay.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Gordon Ramsay-style creamy scrambled eggs: soft curds, butter, exact TM6 and TM7 settings and a café-worthy breakfast method. (10 min, serves 2)
- [Beef Bourguignon](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/beef-bourguignon-julia-child.html): My Thermomix version of Julia Child's beef bourguignon — a rich red-wine beef stew, low and slow in one bowl. (90 min, serves 5)
- [Gazpacho](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/gazpacho-jose-andres.html): My Thermomix take on José Andrés' silky Spanish gazpacho — a cold soup blitzed in seconds. (10 min, serves 4)
- [Lemon Drizzle Cake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-drizzle-cake-mary-berry.html): My Thermomix version of Mary Berry's lemon drizzle cake — tender crumb, crunchy lemon top. (50 min, serves 10)
- [Lemon Curd](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/lemon-curd-ina-garten.html): My Thermomix take on Ina Garten's lemon curd — glossy, tangy and impossible to scramble. (15 min, serves 8)
- [Spiced Chickpea Stew](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/spiced-chickpea-stew-alison-roman.html): A Chef Aly Thermomix reinterpretation of Alison Roman-style spiced chickpea stew: warming pantry ingredients, metric weights and exact TM6 and TM7 settings for dinner. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Tarka Dal](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/tarka-dal-madhur-jaffrey.html): My Thermomix take on Madhur Jaffrey's tarka dal — creamy lentils with a sizzling spiced topping. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Hainanese Chicken Rice](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/hainanese-chicken-rice-adam-liaw.html): My Thermomix version of Adam Liaw's Hainanese chicken rice — silky poached chicken and fragrant rice, cooked together. (40 min, serves 4)
- [Fig & Vanilla Jam](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/fig-vanilla-jam-maggie-beer.html): My Thermomix take on Maggie Beer's fig & vanilla jam — glossy, not too sweet, perfect with cheese. (40 min, serves 16)
- [Orange & Almond Cake](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/orange-almond-cake-claudia-roden.html): My Thermomix version of Claudia Roden's famous flourless orange & almond cake — impossibly moist and gluten-free. (65 min, serves 10)
- [Coconut Fish Curry](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/coconut-fish-curry-rick-stein.html): My Thermomix take on Rick Stein's coconut fish curry — fragrant, gentle, and the fish stays whole. (35 min, serves 4)
- [Chicken Laksa](https://thermiechef.com.au/recipes/chicken-laksa-poh-ling-yeow.html): My Thermomix version of Poh Ling Yeow's chicken laksa — a fragrant coconut noodle soup from a homemade paste. (40 min, serves 4)

## Tools
- [Recipe converter](https://thermiechef.com.au/index.html#convert): Paste any recipe and get back the Thermomix method.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +61 424 310 504
- Buy a Thermomix through Chef Aly: https://thermiechef.com.au/index.html#offer
